name: Azure Reflections / 舞華蒼魔鏡
descr:
日本人气的同人游戏“东方Project”以横版弹幕游戏的姿态登场！
[img]https://shared.fastly.steamstatic.com/store_item_assets/steam/apps/928440/extras/MaihanaTalkAndBullet.gif?t=1694658241[/img]

上下左右，四面八方而来的敌人，一涌而来的无数弹幕！
预测弹幕，见机冲撞！利用“遨游弹幕”给予敌人重创吧！
[img]https://shared.fastly.steamstatic.com/store_item_assets/steam/apps/928440/extras/MaihanaRush.gif?t=1694658241[/img]

你有本事闯过Lunatic模式吗？
[img]https://shared.fastly.steamstatic.com/store_item_assets/steam/apps/928440/extras/MaihanaCollection.gif?t=1694658241[/img]

【游戏简介】

日本人气的同人游戏“东方Project”以横版弹幕游戏的姿态登场！
[img]https://shared.fastly.steamstatic.com/store_item_assets/steam/apps/928440/extras/MaihanaTalkAndBullet.gif?t=1694658241[/img]

上下左右，四面八方而来的敌人，一涌而来的无数弹幕！
预测弹幕，见机冲撞！利用“遨游弹幕”给予敌人重创吧！
[img]https://shared.fastly.steamstatic.com/store_item_assets/steam/apps/928440/extras/MaihanaRush.gif?t=1694658241[/img]
